title: Add Laravel feature tests for mobile API
goal: Prove the mobile API key, authentication, RBAC, and QR lookup behavior work reliably.
implementation_steps: Create feature tests using Laravel testing utilities.
Set config services.mobile.api_key to a known test key during tests.
Create users for admin, librarian, and borrower roles.
Create at least one book with isbn set to a known QR/library reference value.
Create transactions linked to the book for staff response tests.
Test mobile route with wrong x-api-key.
Test mobile login with correct x-api-key.
Test mobile login rejects wrong credentials.
Test protected route rejects missing Bearer token.
Test /api/mobile/me returns role_label User for borrower.
Test QR lookup returns book details for valid code.
Test QR lookup returns 422 for missing code.
Test QR lookup returns 404 for unknown code.

test_cases.name: mobile_register_creates_borrower
test_cases.expected: 201 with role borrower and role_label User

acceptance_criteria: Tests do not depend on real .env values.
Tests do not require external network access.
